description: Default standards-based mounting height per STING fixture category, for the DWG->seed->swap bridge (DwgFixtureBridge). When the bridge builds a synthetic PlacementRule for a captured fixture it looks the rule's category up here and sets HeightStandard + MountingHeightMm (= the standard's PreferredMm from STING_HEIGHT_STANDARDS.json), so a DWG-placed socket lands at 450mm, a switch at 1350mm, an MCP at 1400mm etc. with zero user input. Override per project at <project>/_BIM_COORD/category_height_defaults.json (same shape; entries layer over this corporate baseline by category name).
notes: heightStandard MUST be a key in STING_HEIGHT_STANDARDS.json; the resolved MountingHeightMm is that entry's PreferredMm.
Only categories in the DWG_SYMBOL_MAP fixtureCategories allowlist need an entry; others default to the rule's built-in 300mm.

Ceiling-hosted fixtures (lighting/sprinkler/air terminal/ceiling fire devices) host to the ceiling face, so their mounting height is largely informational; values here are sensible defaults the user can override per layer in the Map-DWG-Layers dialog.

The Map-DWG-Layers dialog's Mounting-height combo lists ONLY these named standards in its dropdown; any other height is typed directly in mm (the combo is editable). There is no raw quick-list to maintain.
